shortDescription: Charming 2-bedroom bungalow in Agincourt with a deep lot and detached garage.
fullDescription: Welcome to 14 Brimwood Boulevard in the vibrant Agincourt neighbourhood. This inviting bungalow offers the ease of single-level living with a generous lot and private garden. The main living area showcases original architectural details alongside tasteful modern updates. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. The 2 bedrooms are well-proportioned, with the primary suite featuring a walk-in closet and updated ensuite. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Spacious kitchen with marble backsplash and gas range
